evals.description: Triggers when user asks to package source code as a zip.
prompts: 把当前代码打包成 zip 给我

evals.description: Triggers when user wants to share or send the codebase as a file.
prompts: 想把这个项目分享出去

evals.description: Triggers when user asks to package only the source, not build artifacts.
prompts: 把源代码打包，不要构建产物
pack the source without build artifacts

evals.description: Does NOT trigger on push/deploy requests — those are jz-push-code's job.
Does NOT trigger on commit requests — those are jz-commit-code's job.
Does NOT trigger on tarball or other archive formats unless user specifically asks for zip.
